title: The end of the world for eva fans at least
display_title: The end of the world for eva fans at least
summary:
[]: The end of the world...... for eva fans at least.             Quote Post by ReiAyanami25 » Wed Nov 02, 2011 2:25 am This was something I happened to be pondering today; what would happen if everything relating to eva, including the creators, merchandise, manga, anime and anything else, suddenly vanished? What would be your reaction, and how would you cope living in a world without Evangelion?

[]:        &n

chunks.content:
Article: The end of the world for eva fans at least
[]: The end of the world...... for eva fans at least.             Quote Post by ReiAyanami25 » Wed Nov 02, 2011 2:25 am This was something I happened to be pondering today; what would happen if everything relating to eva, including the creators, merchandise, manga, anime and anything else, suddenly vanished? What would be your reaction, and how would you cope living in a world without Evangelion?

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Wed Nov 02, 2011 2:29 am If this should happen right now I guess I will be fine. I am already past the period of obsessive attachment to the franchise. I can even live freely without feeling the urge to watch any Eva NME movies. I own little Eva merchandise and no Eva BD/DVD/LD/tapes. I guess I will surely miss my Rebuild doujin, but the images of LAS Asuka will live forever in my mind, so if it has to be I can let go of the physical bits.

[]: Re: The end of the world...... for eva fans at least.             Quote Post by Tarnsman » Wed Nov 02, 2011 3:53 am ReiAyanami25 wrote: how would you cope living in a world without Evangelion?

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Wed Nov 02, 2011 4:03 am I guess it also means this forum EGF also vanishes?

[]:             Quote Post by Final Messenger » Wed Nov 02, 2011 4:31 am symbv wrote: If this should happen right now I will surely miss my Rebuild doujin.

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Wed Nov 02, 2011 5:17 am Final Messenger wrote: You have doujin's about rebuild (or did you mean retake?)

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Nov 02, 2011 8:36 am I would still have a shit-ton of video games to play.

[]:             Quote Post by liquidus118 » Wed Nov 02, 2011 8:42 am I'd be irritated at myself for not rewatching EoE yet and making a point of forgetting as much as possible, then begin committing to paper and memory as much of it

Article: The end of the world for eva fans at least
 Wed Nov 02, 2011 8:42 am I'd be irritated at myself for not rewatching EoE yet and making a point of forgetting as much as possible, then begin committing to paper and memory as much of it as I could. Then discuss it a lot.

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Wed Nov 02, 2011 10:20 am No more Anno style mind screws. But all seriousness I guess a bit of me would be missing.That means no more watching EoE in the middle of the night for me. also no more SXA shipping.:(

[]: Evangelution is bad. BO             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Wed Nov 02, 2011 11:02 am The Eva Monkey wrote: I would still have a shit-ton of video games to play.

[]:             Quote Post by Caprice » Wed Nov 02, 2011 11:05 am I would be upset initially, but only temporarily. I just want to see how the Rebuild series ends. That's all I ask!

[]:             Quote Post by MandarinOrange » Wed Nov 02, 2011 11:20 am I'd look at the empty places on my bookshelf and think, "Damn, there went all that money "

[]: Re: The end of the world...... for eva fans at least.             Quote Post by Jayfive » Wed Nov 02, 2011 11:32 am ReiAyanami25 wrote: This was something I happened to be pondering today; what would happen if everything relating to eva, including the creators, merchandise, manga, anime and anything else, suddenly vanished?

[]: Re: Evangelution is bad. BO             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Nov 02, 2011 11:39 am Alaska Slim wrote: But like the crying Indian, a tear would come to your eye whenever you glanced over at your bare shelf.

[]:             Quote Post by arkiel » Wed Nov 02, 2011 1:58 pm Hm. I'd novelize everything and make a mint. Copyright without any original or copies? Good luck with that.

[]:             Quote Post by ReiAyanami25 » Wed Nov 02, 2011 2:01 pm bobbyfischer

Article: The end of the world for eva fans at least
 everything and make a mint. Copyright without any original or copies? Good luck with that.

[]:             Quote Post by ReiAyanami25 » Wed Nov 02, 2011 2:01 pm bobbyfischer's ghost wrote: also no more SXA shipping.:(

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Nov 02, 2011 2:18 pm bobbyfischer's ghost wrote: also no more SXA shipping.:(

[]:             Quote Post by KingXanaduu » Wed Nov 02, 2011 2:22 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Worse still, no more AxK shipping... :(

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Nov 02, 2011 2:27 pm xanderkh wrote: Worse yet, NO shipping of any kind.......

[]:             Quote Post by Final Messenger » Wed Nov 02, 2011 2:29 pm Wait........ I thought shipping was pairing two characters if there was no Evangelion we could still ship characters from other series (although I would not really care the only two I have ever shipped in my life is A/S)
